rules: Public verifier and audit packet manifests must point to authoritative truth pointers, not stale tracked truth.
Documentary authority labels must make non-authoritative surfaces explicit.
Commercial claim surfaces must compile allowed and forbidden current-tense claims from settled truth, public verifier, and runtime-boundary receipts.
Commercial claim surfaces must not present main-bound documentary mirrors as the active truth source.
summary: External legibility surfaces are documentary, sanitized, tied to authoritative truth pointers, and mechanically constrained by compiled claim boundaries.
